title: SendFrameNotificationsReqBody
description: Neynar Farcaster API schema for SendFrameNotificationsReqBody

filters.description: Filters to apply to the target_fids set. All filters are additive, so only users matching all filters will be notified.

exclude_fids.description: Only send notifications to users who are not in the given FIDs.

following_fid.description: Only send notifications to users who follow the given FID.

minimum_user_score.description: Only send notifications to users with a score greater than or equal to this value.

near_location.description: Only send notifications to users near a given location.

radius.description: The radius in meters for the location search. Any location within this radius will be returned.

body.description: The body of the notification. Must be between 1 and 128 characters.
body.example: You have received a new message in your inbox.

target_url.description: The target URL to open when the user clicks the notification. Must be a valid URL.

title.description: The title of the notification. Must be between 1 and 32 characters.

uuid.description: An optional UUID for the notification, used as an idempotency key.

target_fids.description: An array of target FIDs to whom the notifications should be sent. Each FID must be a positive integer. Pass an empty array to send notifications to all FIDs with notifications enabled for the mini app.
